text: Just a reminder that the deadline is TODAY. I thought everyone knew this.
Sure, happy to help — though I did flag this risk in last week's meeting.
Great work on the launch everyone! Really proud of what the team achieved.
I'll take a look when I have bandwidth. No promises on timing.
Interesting approach… though I wonder if leadership would actually approve this.
We need to ship this by EOD or the whole quarter is at risk. No exceptions.
Does anyone else think this is the right direction? Just want to make sure we're all aligned.
I appreciate the feedback, but the final call on this is mine.
